title: Julie’s Fast Salsa
ingredients: 1 can Original Rotel Tomatoes and chilis
½ onion, chopped (do not use if making for Katie and/or Jen)
Pinch or two of kosher salt
instructions: Place all ingredients in blender except the petite diced tomatoes.  Blend well.  Add petite diced tomatoes and blend lightly.  Add more salt if needed.  Serve with quesadillas, nachos, scrambled eggs.
